title: Fix login crash on empty password input
description: Users who submit the login form with an empty password field receive a 500 error instead of a validation message. Reproduce: POST /auth/login with password omitted.

title: Add OAuth 2.0 support for Google sign-in
description: Implement Google OAuth 2.0 flow. Users should be able to sign in with their Google account from the login page. Requires registering the app in Google Cloud Console.

title: Refactor auth middleware to use token introspection
description: Replace the current JWT decode-and-verify approach with an introspection call to the auth server. This lets us support token revocation without waiting for expiry.

title: Audit legacy session endpoints for deprecation
description: Identify all endpoints that still use the old session-cookie auth model. Mark them for removal in the next major release and file follow-up tickets.
